label: Extra outcome chance description
description: A description entry shown in the ritual outcome UI that can vary by ritual quality, used by extraOutcomeDescriptions on RitualOutcomeEffectDef.

description.label: Description
description.description: Display text shown in the extra outcome description list.

qualityToValue.label: Quality to value
qualityToValue.description: Static method reference (e.g. PregnancyUtility.ChanceMomDiesDuringBirth) converting a quality float to a display value. Not resolved by the editor; stored as a plain string.
